description_long: This is a heavy-duty electric drill with a robust, ergonomic handle and a rugged, industrial design. The body is primarily composed of orange and black plastic with a white metallic section near the drill head, showing signs of wear and use. A thick power cord extends from the rear, indicating it is powered by mains electricity. The front features a cylindrical chuck with no drill bit currently attached, and the side displays a visible label with some text. Ventilation slots are present on the white section to prevent overheating during operation. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for demanding urban construction or repair tasks.
description: A rugged, orange and black electric drill with a thick power cord, ergonomic handle, and visible ventilation slots. The drill head is metallic and no bit is attached.
description_view_0: Side view showing the handle, power cord, label, and ventilation slots on the white section near the drill head.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the end of the handle, the power cord attachment, and the back casing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the handle, power cord, and more of the drill's body contours and casing details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the cylindrical chuck, metallic drill head, and the alignment of the handle above.
